overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a video game depicting a gothic wizarding school common room or divination classroom. Students in dark robes sit on cushions around tables with glowing crystal balls, surrounded by stone walls, tapestries, and tall arched windows with purple curtains. Warm morning light streams through the windows, illuminating the medieval interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: divination classroom with crystal ball tables and floor seating

agents.ego_description: sitting cross-legged on a cushion in the center foreground, facing the room

notable_agents.action: student wearing glasses sitting on cushion, occasionally gesturing with hands
student sitting with back to camera on a blue floor cushion

entered.detail: large wall tapestry depicting a robed figure with a unicorn against a starry background
tall pointed-arch windows with stone frames allowing warm light to enter
heavy purple drapes flanking the gothic windows
round wooden table with a glowing crystal ball orb on top
decorative patterned rug covering the stone floor in the seating area
rough stone wall with several framed paintings and a decorative wall hanging

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a gothic divination classroom with students seated on cushions around tables holding crystal balls. Warm morning light filters through tall arched windows with purple curtains, illuminating a large tapestry on the left wall. The scene remains largely static with minimal character movement throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, atmospheric gaze into a gothic divination classroom bathed in the soft glow of early morning. It begins with a wide view of students in dark robes seated on cushions, their attention focused on glowing crystal balls atop wooden tables. As the light filters through tall arched windows draped in purple curtains, the illumination spreads across the room to highlight a large, intricate tapestry on the left wall. The scene remains poised in a state of quiet contemplation, with the camera holding its position as minimal character movements blend into the stillness of the medieval interior.
